groq_prompt:
You are looking at 3 sequential frames from a tennis match showing a single shot being played.

Identify the shot from this list:
- serve: starting shot from baseline, racket overhead, ball toss above
- forehand: groundstroke hit from the dominant-hand side after the bounce
- backhand: groundstroke hit from the non-dominant side, often two-handed
- volley: hit before the ball bounces, usually near the net
- overhead: smash motion from a high ball above the player
- drop_shot: soft touch that lands just over the net
- slice: low spin shot, racket cuts under the ball

Respond in EXACTLY this format, nothing else:
SHOT: <one of: serve|forehand|backhand|volley|overhead|drop_shot|slice|unknown>
CONFIDENCE: <number from 0.0 to 1.0>

Use 0.9+ when very obvious, 0.7-0.9 when likely, 0.5-0.7 when plausible, below 0.5 when uncertain. Use 'unknown' with 0.0 only if no shot is being played.
